capabilities: Implement a logging strategy that captures AI prompt interactions, ensuring traceability and performance insights.

procedure.action: Initialize structured logging to capture prompt inputs and outputs using JSON format for easy parsing.

Compose a logging library like Logback or Winston to handle log rotation and persistence by composing module interfaces via adapter pattern; assert input/output type contracts match before connecting; assert integration_error_count < 1 after contract validation.

Set log levels to DEBUG for development and INFO for production, ensuring sensitive data is redacted using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Invoke a centralized logging system like ELK Stack or Splunk to aggregate and visualize logs by invoking the target API with the specified parameters; assert response_status < 400 and response_time_ms < 5000; log request_id and response_code.

Alert on anomalies in prompt response times by setting thresholds in your monitoring system using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

summary: Develop a logging strategy tailored for AI prompting systems by applying domain-specific constraints and examples to enhance observability and debugging.
title: Specialized Logging Strategy for AI Prompting

failureConditions: Logs become unmanageable due to excessive verbosity.
Sensitive data is exposed in logs; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
Anomalies in prompt responses go undetected; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
Logs are not accessible for debugging; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
metrics: input/output type contracts match before connecting
successConditions: Verify logs are structured and parsable by querying with jq; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Check log rotation is functioning by simulating high log volume; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Ensure sensitive data is redacted by reviewing log samples; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Test alerting by simulating slow prompt responses; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
